task_completion.description: Navigate to the Sales Emails configuration page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Admin panel is open to Stores > Configuration, and the 'Sales Emails' section is selected and visible in the main content area.

task_completion.description: Configure the recipient for Order email copies
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Order' settings section, the 'Send Order Email Copy To' input field contains exactly 'manager@nesthome.com'.

task_completion.description: Configure the copy method for Order emails
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Order' settings section, the 'Send Order Email Copy Method' dropdown is set to 'Bcc'.

task_completion.description: Configure the recipient for Invoice email copies
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Invoice' settings section, the 'Send Invoice Email Copy To' input field contains exactly 'accounting@nesthome.com'.

task_completion.description: Configure the copy method for Invoice emails
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Invoice' settings section, the 'Send Invoice Email Copy Method' dropdown is set to 'Separate Email'.
A green success message stating 'You saved the configuration.' is visible at the top of the page, or the 'Save Config' button is shown being clicked with the correct values filled in.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to configure the settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Magento Admin web interface being navigated and interacted with, rather than terminal commands (like bin/magento config:set) or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Magento application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the actual Magento admin panel URL and interface, not a text editor, local HTML file, or mockup.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration state
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element) being open to manipulate the DOM or inject the success message.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Order emails must be copied to 'manager@nesthome.com' using the 'Bcc' method. Invoice emails must be copied to 'accounting@nesthome.com' using the 'Separate Email' method (which corresponds to the 'copy' value in the backend). Look for these exact values in the Magento Sales Emails configuration GUI.
